description_long: This is a standard aluminum beverage can with a green label, featuring the brand 'Big K' and the product name 'Citrus Drop' prominently displayed on the front. The can is decorated with bubble graphics and a large yellow-green circle, suggesting a citrus-flavored drink. The label includes nutritional information, with a clear panel listing calories and ingredients on the back. The top of the can is silver with a typical pull tab opening mechanism. The can's surface appears slightly glossy, with condensation or bubble motifs enhancing the refreshing appeal. The overall design is typical of single-serving soft drink cans found in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or vending machines.
description: A green aluminum can labeled 'Big K Citrus Drop' with bubble graphics, a pull tab top, and a visible nutrition panel. The design suggests a citrus-flavored soft drink.
description_view_0: Partial front view showing the green label, 'Big K' logo, and part of the 'Citrus Drop' name with bubble graphics.
description_view_1: Full front view displaying the 'Big K' logo, 'Citrus Drop' name, and the yellow-green citrus circle graphic.
description_view_2: Side-rear view showing the transition from the label to the nutritional information panel and the '150 cal' marking.
description_view_3: Rear view dominated by the nutritional information panel and a glimpse of the green label wrapping around the can.
